purpose: Record combat implementation pass for Galaxy of Intrigue feats.

implementedEntries.name: Demoralizing Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: When an Attack of Opportunity successfully deals damage, helper exposes an immediate Free Action Persuasion/Intimidate extra skill use against the damaged opponent.

implementedEntries.name: Flèche
implementedEntries.mechanic: Once per encounter when selected on a Charge, runtime exposes natural 17-20 as critical threat range for that charge attack and provides spendChargeAttackRider for encounter use tracking.

implementedEntries.name: Grazing Shot
implementedEntries.mechanic: Adds actor-aware Grazing Shot action card for actors with the feat. Runtime helper exposes two attack rolls, secondary target line-of-sight/range predicates, and one all-or-nothing split damage roll if both attacks hit.

implementedEntries.name: Indomitable Personality
implementedEntries.mechanic: Once per encounter, helper exposes a Reaction resource that adds the actor's Charisma modifier to Will Defense until the end of the actor's next turn.

implementedEntries.name: Meat Shield
implementedEntries.mechanic: When an opponent attacks while using Cover provided by another character, creature, or Droid, helper exposes advisory metadata treating the actor as in Cover from that opponent.

implementedEntries.name: Sadistic Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: When delivering a Coup de Grace to a Helpless creature, helper exposes a condition-track rider moving all opponents within line of sight -1 step until end of encounter.

implementedEntries.name: Stand Tall
implementedEntries.mechanic: Once per encounter when the actor takes damage, helper exposes advisory metadata for allies within 6 squares and line of sight to make a Reaction single attack against the damaging source.

implementedEntries.name: Wookiee Grip
implementedEntries.mechanic: When one-handing a proficient weapon that normally requires two hands, helper exposes advisory metadata permitting the handling with a -2 attack penalty for melee or ranged weapons.

automationBoundary.Demoralizing Strike: AoO damage workflow must call getAttackOfOpportunityDamageRiders after damage is dealt and launch the Persuasion Intimidate extra skill use as a Free Action.
automationBoundary.Flèche: Charge attack workflow must expose/select the fleche option, use the criticalThreatNaturalMin metadata during crit evaluation, and call spendChargeAttackRider after confirmed use.
automationBoundary.Grazing Shot: Special ranged attack workflow must call getSpecialRangedAttackActions, resolve both attack rolls before damage, verify secondary target LOS and 6-square distance, and apply split damage only if both attacks hit.
automationBoundary.Indomitable Personality: Will-defense/incoming effect workflow must call getDefenseReactionResources, apply the temporary Will bonus, and call spendDefenseReactionResource after confirmed use.
automationBoundary.Meat Shield: Incoming attack/cover workflow must provide attackerInCoverProvidedByCharacterCreatureOrDroid context and consume getCoverRiders as advisory cover metadata.
automationBoundary.Sadistic Strike: Coup de Grace workflow must call getCoupDeGraceRiders after a qualifying helpless target is dispatched and apply the encounter-duration condition-track effect to opponents in line of sight.
automationBoundary.Stand Tall: Damage workflow must call getAllyReactionRiders when the feat owner takes damage, present reactions to eligible allies, and call spendAllyReactionRider after confirmed use.
automationBoundary.Wookiee Grip: Weapon handling/attack workflow must pass normallyTwoHandedWeapon and oneHandingNormallyTwoHandedWeapon context; runtime exposes advisory metadata and does not invent a two-handed weapon system flag.
